lines: Cassia slides a flat loaf from the oven and checks its underside before its top.
"If you came to settle the queue, wash your hands. Authority still handles bread here."
"Row Six moved its dough ahead of Ezra’s grain load. They had a fever house and no morning meal."
"The rule says grain work first. The oven says food burns on schedule."
"Everyone who patches them and nobody who only points."
"That arrangement has survived four councils because it cannot fit on a deed."
